name: Italian Fried Knots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the flour, salt, sugar, vanilla extract, and melted butter.
2. Gradually add 1 tablespoon of water (or sweet wine) to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Let the dough rest for 1 hour at room temperature.
4. Roll out the dough quite thin on a floured surface.
5. Cut into strips using a sharp knife.
6. Tie each strip into knots.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet or deep fryer to about 350°F (175°C).
8. Carefully lower the tied knots into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, turning occasionally. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. In a saucepan, mix honey, demerara sugar, and 1/4 cup water. Heat over medium-low heat until the sugar dissolves completely.
10. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
11. Dip the fried knots into the honey glaze, allowing excess to fall off.
12. Sprinkle with non-pareils (candied ginger pieces) before serving on a platter.
